data.title: Chill Spritz Takes Flight with airBaltic -- and Your Next Journey Just Got an Upgrade
data.description: In London on April 15, 2026, Chill Spritz revealed an important collaboration with airBaltic, introducing its unique functional sparkling beverage to passengers traveling throughout the airline's European routes. This partnership signifies a significant step for both companies, promising an exciting opportunity for travelers to enjoy Chill Spritz during their flights.

data.title: Best Online Eyeglasses (2026): EZContacts Recognized for Wide Selection of Designer Frames by Consumer365
data.description: In the latest review by Consumer365 in 2026, EZContacts has been acknowledged for its exceptional offerings in the online eyeglasses retail sector. The platform stands out for its expansive collection of designer frames and prescription eyewear. This recognition underscores the trend toward online shopping for eyeglasses, showcasing EZContacts as a leading player in the industry.

data.title: Turion Raises $75+ Million Series B to Accelerate U.S. Space Superiority
data.description: The company has secured additional funding to enhance its fleet deployment and broaden intelligence collection for Space Domain Awareness, as well as to expand the distribution of its Starfire™ operating system. This funding comes at a crucial time with significant momentum and a proven track record of successful execution. The headquarters in Irvine, California announced this development on April 15, 2026.

data.title: M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE: MTB) announces first quarter 2026 results
data.description: Buffalo, New York - On April 15, 2026, M&T Bank Corporation released its quarterly financial results, showcasing a net income of $664 million, equivalent to $4.13 per diluted earnings per common share. The notable figures for the company's earnings include net interest income of $X million. This financial report compares the numbers from the first quarter of 2026 (1Q26) with the fourth quarter of 2025 (4Q25) and the first quarter of 2025 (1Q25). It highlights the steady performance and growth of M&T Bank Corporation in its latest financial period.

data.title: MiCA-compliant USDCV stablecoin by Societe Generale now live on MetaMask, offering millions access to bank-issued dollar token for DeFi and payments.
data.description: Societe Generale's USDCV stablecoin, compliant with MiCA regulations, has now been integrated with MetaMask. This development provides millions of users with access to a dollar token issued by a bank for both DeFi activities and payments.

data.title: Paratus Energy Services Ltd. - Result of Bondholders written resolution
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Hamilton, Bermuda, a summons was issued regarding a written resolution dated March 26, 2026. The resolution seeks bondholders' approval for amendments to bond terms related to a transaction announced by the company on March 23. This request for approval is significant as it impacts the terms of the bonds and represents a key step in the announced transaction.

data.title: Gloo Holdings Stock Jump 10% In Pre-Market: Here's What You Should Know
data.description: Shares of Gloo Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: GLOO) saw a notable uptick of 10.39% to $6.80 in pre-market trading on Wednesday following the release of the company's fourth-quarter financial results. The Colorado-based technology platform reported quarterly revenue of $33.6 million, surpassing analyst projections by 5.10%. Additionally, Gloo Holdings announced its fiscal 2025 results and raised its full-year revenue guidance. In Q4, the company's revenue reached $33.63 million, marking an impressive 418% year-over-year growth and surpassing expectations. Platform revenue totaled $20.1 million, while platform solutions contributed $13.5 million. Gloo Holdings disclosed a net loss of $48.6 million due to significant non-cash charges and reported an adjusted EBITDA of negative $18.6 million, slightly outperforming consensus estimates.
